title: Mobility Suppression Boundary Principle for Polymer Glass Transition Temperature
description: Public-safe code, manuscript, figures, tables, and reproducibility package for MSBP-Tg. MSBP density is exactly -rotatable_bonds/heavy_atoms; the contribution is boundary-coordinate framing and within-fiber validation, not descriptor invention. Raw and row-level third-party SMILES/Tg data are not redistributed.
notes: Preprint software-release metadata. The MIT license covers original code and documentation only; third-party data retain their original terms and are not redistributed. Archived release DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21100020.
